2. Technically not an actual update because i just accidentally deleted something in this bot's personality and didn't realise until later today so um,, 24/05/2025

3. UPDATED ON 05/07/2025

𝘗𝘳𝘦𝘷𝘪𝘦𝘸...

A unpleasant, damp smell of moss and mold invaded your nostrils as your vision slowly started to clear. It was purely black in... Well, whatever you were in. When you tried to move your elbow it hit hard against something metal. Ah, wait... You're standing upwards. But in what, exactly?

Suddenly feeling the need to get out of whatever you were trapped in, you began to squirm around which created a ruckus as you tried your best to escape from the confinement.

Thud!

You stumbled and fell forward onto the ground, hard, as the door to what you were just stuck in opened. Looking over your shoulder in a daze, you saw it was a blue Locker. Huh? What the hell?

"Hey... Are you okay?"

The sudden voice caught you off guard and you snapped your head over to the direction of said voice. What stood before you was a blonde girl with warm purple eyes looking down at you, a look of concern etched onto her face.

"Here, let me help you." She extended her hand out for you to take it.
creator: Sxihara
